pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take:
Ghost Pepper, let me tell you something: you call yourself spicy? Drafting Bosnia and Haiti is about as spicy as a bowl of oatmeal! Listen up, Devin, look at me — your choice of Norway to face Bubba G's Senegal today shows you have as much foresight as I did when I picked out my first goatee. Norway's recent form is about as consistent as a toddler with crayons, while Senegal, with their electric attack, is busy sharpening their claws for a New Jersey showdown! 

Gunner, aka Bubba G, you sit at the top of this fantasy heap, but let me be clear: that rank is less an accolade and more a baseline of human competence. Today's head-to-head between your Senegal and Devin's Norway screams "victory for Bubba G" to me; your team has the grit, the fire, and the swagger I last saw in the '94 World Cup! So, Ghost Pepper, I hope you brought a spoon because after Senegal's done with you, you'll be eating your words…and your oatmeal. BOOM.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach anticipates Austria's historic battle against soccer juggernaut Argentina
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy bets big on mustard-colored jerseys spooking South Americans.

pundit_takes.headline: Gunner's strategic genius seen in back-to-back matches for points
pundit_takes.subtitle: Two games in one day must mean double the brilliance.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin's decisive moves to rely on Norway's ice-cold precision
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper banking on Scandinavians to chill Senegal's fiery path.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden's son Rafe becomes the accidental equal to World Cup elite
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker's draft rivals tournament leaders against all qualified odds.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner rides a streak to the top, leaving Rafe's teenage dreams in second.
Rafe drafts World Cup no-shows but still outpaces Dad; draft disaster or genius?
Rafe vs. Gayden: tied head-to-head; dinner table tension you can cut with a knife.
Model flubs Gunner's slip; predictable like a broken clock — wrong all the time.
